title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMHistoric
description: A historic site or monument from OpenStreetMap tagged with historic=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMHistoric

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

historicType.description: Property. The OSM historic tag classifying the feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:historic'

heritageLevel.description: Property. Level of heritage designation (international, national, regional). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:heritage:operator'

ruins.description: Property. Indicates if the feature is in ruins. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ruins'

fee.description: Property. Indicates if a fee must be paid to visit. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:fee'

startDate.description: Property. Year or period of origin/construction. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:start_date'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
